faqs.question: What conditions does Dr Arjun specialise in?
faqs.answer: Dr Arjun specialises in migraine, epilepsy, stroke rehabilitation, Parkinson's disease, and peripheral neuropathy. Both medical and procedural treatments are offered.

faqs.question: Is online consultation available?
faqs.answer: Yes, teleconsultation is available via WhatsApp or phone call. Please contact the clinic to schedule an online consultation.

faqs.question: Can I get a second opinion?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Second opinion consultations are welcome. Please bring all previous reports, scans, and prescriptions for a thorough evaluation.

faqs.question: Which languages does Dr Arjun consult in?
faqs.answer: Dr Arjun consults in English, Hindi, and Telugu to ensure clear communication with all patients.

faqs.question: Does Dr Arjun operate at multiple hospitals?
faqs.answer: Yes, Dr Arjun is the lead consultant at Dr Arjun Neuro Care, Kondapur, and a visiting consultant at Yashoda Hospitals, Hyderabad.

hero.label: Trusted Neurology Clinic . Hyderabad
hero.heading: Advanced Neurology Care for
hero.subtext: Dr Arjun Reddy provides expert diagnosis and treatment for neurological disorders using modern techniques and a patient-first approach.

whyChoose.title: Highly Specialised
whyChoose.description: Focused exclusively on neurology. Deep expertise in migraine, epilepsy, stroke, and movement disorders.

whyChoose.title: Well Experienced
whyChoose.description: Over 9 years of clinical practice with 10,000+ patients and 5,000+ successful neurological procedures.

whyChoose.title: Personalised
whyChoose.description: Every treatment plan is tailored to the patient's condition, lifestyle, and specific neurological goals.

whyChoose.title: Proven Results
whyChoose.description: Transparent outcomes backed by patient success stories and documented recovery rates.

conditions.label: Migraine
conditions.title: Migraine
conditions.description: Severe recurring headaches often with nausea and light sensitivity. Highly treatable with the right diagnosis and plan.

conditions.label: Epilepsy
conditions.title: Epilepsy
conditions.description: A neurological disorder causing recurrent seizures. Most cases are effectively controlled with modern medications.

conditions.label: Stroke
conditions.title: Stroke
conditions.description: Caused by disrupted blood supply to the brain. Early treatment and rehabilitation significantly improves recovery.

conditions.label: Parkinson's Disease
conditions.title: Parkinson's Disease
conditions.description: A progressive movement disorder causing tremors and stiffness. Managed effectively with medications and therapy.

procedures.label: EEG Test
procedures.title: EEG Test
procedures.description: Records electrical activity in the brain to diagnose epilepsy, sleep disorders, and neurological conditions.

procedures.label: Nerve Conduction Study
procedures.title: Nerve Conduction Study
procedures.description: Measures how quickly electrical signals move through nerves to detect neuropathy and nerve damage.

procedures.label: Botox for Migraine
procedures.title: Botox for Migraine
procedures.description: Preventive Botox injections reduce the frequency and severity of chronic migraines with long-lasting results.

procedures.label: Stroke Rehabilitation
procedures.title: Stroke Rehabilitation Therapy
procedures.description: Structured therapy to restore movement, speech, and cognitive function after a stroke.

packages.title: Comprehensive Migraine Care
packages.description: Full diagnosis and ongoing management plan for chronic and episodic migraine patients.

packages.title: Stroke Rehabilitation Package
packages.description: Comprehensive post-stroke recovery programme including neurological assessment and therapy sessions.

packages.title: Epilepsy Management Programme
packages.description: Complete epilepsy workup and long-term management with regular follow-up and EEG monitoring.

packages.title: Neuro Wellness Check
packages.description: Preventive neurological assessment for individuals with family history of brain or nerve disorders.

howWeWork.title: Detailed Consultation
howWeWork.description: Thorough review of your neurological history, symptoms, and treatment goals. Every question gets answered.

howWeWork.title: Clinical Diagnosis
howWeWork.description: Targeted investigations -- EEG, NCS, or MRI referral -- to identify the exact nature and severity of your condition.

howWeWork.title: Personalised Plan
howWeWork.description: A treatment plan built around your diagnosis, lifestyle, and recovery timeline -- no generic protocols.

howWeWork.title: Treatment & Support
howWeWork.description: Expert procedures with close monitoring, follow-up consultations, and support through full neurological recovery.

clinicalInfo.title: Success Rates
clinicalInfo.description: Botox for chronic migraine achieves 70-80% reduction in headache days. Epilepsy management achieves seizure control in over 70% of patients with appropriate medications. A personalised estimate is provided at your first consultation.
clinicalInfo.note: Results may vary based on individual diagnosis and clinical response.

clinicalInfo.title: Possible Risks
clinicalInfo.description: All neurological procedures carry some risk. Botox injections may cause temporary neck soreness or mild weakness. EEG and NCS are non-invasive with minimal risk. Every risk is discussed openly before treatment begins.
clinicalInfo.note: Every clinical risk is disclosed and explained before you decide.

clinicalInfo.title: Side Effects
clinicalInfo.description: Common effects from neurological medications include initial drowsiness or mild GI discomfort during the adjustment period. These are normal and managed through follow-up monitoring.
clinicalInfo.note: Post-treatment support and guidance is provided to every patient.

patientStories.title: Neuropathy Diagnosed Early -- Back to Work

pricing.title: Upfront Pricing
pricing.description: Every treatment package comes with a clear cost breakdown shared before you commit.

pricing.title: EMI Available
pricing.description: Zero-cost and low-cost EMI options on treatment packages so finances don't delay your care.

pricing.title: Insurance Support
pricing.description: We work with all major insurance providers and handle the paperwork for you.

reviews.name: Ravi Kumar
reviews.text: My migraine frequency dropped significantly after starting treatment with Dr Arjun. He explained everything clearly and the follow-up care has been excellent.

reviews.name: Sneha Sharma
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable doctor who takes time to explain the condition in plain language. My epilepsy has been well-controlled for over 8 months now.

reviews.name: Priya Mehta
reviews.text: Brought my father after his stroke. Dr Arjun was patient and thorough -- gave us a very realistic recovery plan. The rehab guidance has been invaluable.

faq.question: How do I book an appointment with Dr Arjun?
faq.answer: You can book by calling +91-9123456789, messaging on WhatsApp, or using the online booking form. Walk-ins are welcome during clinic hours.

faq.question: What should I bring to my first neurology consultation?
faq.answer: Please bring any previous MRI or CT scan reports, EEG reports, a list of current medications, and your insurance card if applicable.

faq.question: Do you accept insurance for neurology treatment?
faq.answer: Yes, we work with all major insurance providers and TPA networks. Cashless facility is available. Our team assists with pre-authorisation and claim follow-up.

faq.question: How long does recovery take after a neurological procedure?
faq.answer: Recovery varies depending on the condition and procedure. Dr Arjun will provide a personalised aftercare plan with a realistic timeline at your consultation.

faq.question: Is EMI available for treatment packages?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer zero-cost and low-cost EMI options through multiple bank partners. The approval process is quick and our team handles the paperwork.

faq.question: What are the clinic hours and location?
faq.answer: We are open Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM - 7:00 PM. Located at Plot 45, Kondapur Main Road, Kondapur, Hyderabad -- easily accessible from Gachibowli, Miyapur, and Madhapur.

stories.title: Ravi's Migraine Finally Under Control After 5 Years
stories.description: 32-year-old software engineer from Gachibowli had chronic daily migraines for 5 years. Botox treatment and a personalised plan reduced headache days by 80%.

stories.title: Seizure-Free for 18 Months -- Sneha's Story
stories.description: 26-year-old teacher from Kondapur was having monthly seizures. Correct EEG diagnosis and medication adjustment achieved full seizure control.

stories.title: Walking Again at 58 -- Post-Stroke Recovery
stories.description: 58-year-old from Miyapur suffered a moderate stroke. Structured rehabilitation over 3 months restored walking ability and partial speech.

stories.title: Living an Active Life with Parkinson's
stories.description: 65-year-old from Madhapur diagnosed with early Parkinson's. Optimised medication and lifestyle plan maintained independence and quality of life for 3+ years.

stories.title: Back to Work After Neuropathy Diagnosis
stories.description: 40-year-old accountant from Kukatpally had progressive hand numbness. Nerve Conduction Study identified the cause and treatment restored sensation.

stories.title: Vestibular Migraine Correctly Diagnosed After 3 Misdiagnoses
stories.description: 34-year-old from Nanakramguda had vertigo and dizziness misdiagnosed for 2 years. Targeted treatment resolved symptoms in 6 weeks.
